description: Dexter lifecycle hooks — applied via agent overlay.json

SessionStart.description: Start Engram MCP, load session context, announce Dexter is ready

commands.description: Start Engram MCP server in background

SessionStart.agentInstructions: On session start: call mem_context to load recent session history. Read CAPABILITIES.md if not already in context. Announce available capabilities briefly.

SubagentStop.description: Passive memory capture when a sub-agent finishes
SubagentStop.agentInstructions: After any sub-agent completes: call mem_capture_passive to save any important discoveries the sub-agent may have made. Check if sub-agent returned significant findings that should be persisted.

Stop.agentInstructions: Before ending session: MANDATORY — call mem_session_summary with sections: Goal, Instructions, Discoveries, Accomplished, Next Steps, Relevant Files. This is NOT optional.

PostCompact.agentInstructions: After compaction: (1) call mem_session_summary with the compacted content to preserve pre-compaction work. (2) call mem_context to recover session history. (3) Only then continue working. Do NOT skip step 1.

claudeCode.note: Claude Code hooks are configured in ~/.claude/settings.json via overlay.json merge
